testcase.name: tests.test_pur
testcase.error: tests/test_pur.py:9: in <module> from pur import pur, update_requirements, __version__ pur/__init__.py:49: in <module> from .utils import (ExitCodeException, build_package_finder, can_check_version, pur/utils.py:346: in <module> class ExitCodeException(typer.ExitCodeException): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'typer' has no attribute 'ExitCodeException'
